query:
SELECT ua.ticker, c.conid, c.exchange, c.currency 
FROM userAssets ua 
LEFT JOIN ibkrConidCache c ON c.symbol = ua.ticker 
WHERE ua.archived = 0
ORDER BY ua.ticker;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT ua.ticker, c.conid, c.exchange, c.currency 
FROM userAssets ua 
LEFT JOIN ibkrConidCache c ON c.symbol = ua.ticker 
WHERE ua.archived = 0
ORDER BY ua.ticker;
